block_01: A new year is a new start — a perfect opportunity to make a fresh trading schedule and get into a new daily routine. In fact, many successful businessmen say that having a defined routine helps them be more productive and successful. They can concentrate on the important things, without having to think about the logistics.
block_02: We have collected a checklist that will take you through the day and help you remember all of the most important aspects for a great trading session.
